temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit room, a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a patterned shirt is seen in silhouette. He stands near a window with sheer, lace curtains, and a faint light from outside illuminates the scene. He appears to be on the phone, holding it to his ear. (Storyline: The scene opens by establishing a mysterious and tense atmosphere. The character's identity is obscured, and his phone call suggests he is receiving or delivering important information.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play.)
(00:04-00:07) The man quickly turns and runs away from the window, moving deeper into the dark room. His face is now partially visible, showing a look of distress and urgency as he moves. (Storyline: The character's sudden movement and distressed expression escalate the tension, suggesting he is in a hurry or has just received alarming news.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful music continues, and the sound of the man's footsteps can be heard.)
